backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the WRAITH intelligence platform, defining data types (Mission, AssetProfile, ThreatAssessment, ClassifiedNote, MissionBriefing) and state maps, with mixins for blob storage and authorization, plus admin password verification and user ban management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the fix for a failed Version 5 production deployment, listing the affected frontend files, component dependencies, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, hook, and form in the WRAITH frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the WRAITH React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that sets up TanStack Router with authentication guards, a profile setup modal, and routes for MissionDashboard, IntelligenceHub, FieldOpsBriefing, and AdminPanel pages.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanelConten: Tabbed admin dashboard component providing User Management (ban/unban by principal), Mission Management (CRUD with expandable details), and Asset Profiles (CRUD) using correct enum imports and mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/AssetProfileForm: A React form component for creating and editing asset profiles, including fields for codename, clearance level, specialized skills (via checkboxes), status, and bio, using create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/AssetProfilesSec: Displays a list of all asset profiles with options to create, edit, and delete entries, showing status, clearance level, and specialization badges with confirmation dialogs for deletion.
frontend/src/components/BriefingForm.tsx: A React form for creating and editing mission briefings, supporting dynamic objectives and HVT profile lists along with fields for operation codename, date, lead officer, exfil routes, rules of engagement, and classification level.
frontend/src/components/BriefingView.tsx: A full-screen read-only view of a mission briefing document with print support, displaying classification banner, objectives with priority colors, and HVT profiles with threat-level icons.
frontend/src/components/ClassificationBa: A small presentational component that renders a styled classification banner displaying the clearance level label with appropriate styling.
frontend/src/components/ClassifiedNoteFo: A form component for creating and editing classified notes with title, body, classification level, and author fields, pre-populating the author from the caller's user profile when available.
frontend/src/components/EncryptedNotesSe: React component that displays a list of classified/encrypted notes with expand/collapse, edit, and delete functionality, plus a dialog form for creating or editing notes.
React component that renders a mission's field reports in reverse-chronological order and provides a form to submit new field reports.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a background image, dark overlay, top navigation, main content outlet, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/MissionDetail.ts: React component that shows full details of a single mission (status, threat level, operatives, objectives, field reports) and toggles into an edit form via MissionForm.
frontend/src/components/MissionForm.tsx: Form component for creating or updating a mission, managing fields like codename, status, threat level, mission type, operatives, and objectives with dynamic list inputs.
frontend/src/components/MissionList.tsx: Component that renders a filterable, paginated list of missions with status and threat-level filters, view buttons, and delete confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Top navigation bar component with links to main app sections (Missions, Intel, Briefings, Admin), authentication via Internet Identity, and a mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user registration that collects operative name, callsign, and department, then saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RedactionBar.tsx: Simple presentational component that renders a black redaction bar of configurable width, used to visually censor classified content.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Displays a styled badge for a mission's status (active, compromised, completed, aborted) with color-coded styling per status.
frontend/src/components/ThreatAssessment: Form component for creating or editing a threat assessment, handling fields like subject name, threat category, risk score, summary, and linked missions via create/update mutations.
Section component that lists all threat assessments with risk-colored indicators, and provides UI for adding, editing, and deleting assessments via dialogs.
Inline indicator component that displays a threat level (low, elevated, critical) with a corresponding icon and color styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the user's Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend actor interactions, including CRUD operations for user profiles, missions, assets, threat assessments, classified notes, and mission briefings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a dark military/ops-themed design system using Tailwind CSS with OKLCH color variables, custom fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Share Tech Mono), and utility classes for glows, classification banners, and terminal styling.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, timestamp formatting, and label/class mapping for domain enums such as ClearanceLevel, MissionStatus, ThreatLevel, and SpecializedSkill.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that gates access behind a passphrase verified against the backend actor, rendering the AdminPanelContent component only after successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/FieldOpsBriefing.tsx: Page component for managing mission briefings with CRUD operations, displaying stats (total, classification levels, HVTs), and a list of briefings with view/edit/delete actions via dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/IntelligenceHub.tsx: Page component that organizes the Intelligence Hub into three tabbed sections: Asset Profiles, Threat Assessments, and Encrypted Notes.
frontend/src/pages/MissionDashboard.tsx: Page component for the Mission Operations dashboard showing mission stats, a filterable mission list, and supporting create/view/edit flows via dialogs and detail views.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback for persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark ops-themed design system with custom fonts (Orbitron, Rajdhani, Share Tech Mono), OKLCH-based color tokens (amber, red, green, ops palette), and plugin imports for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 13) describing the WRAITH-themed classified intelligence app's three main features—Mission Dashboard, Intelligence Hub, and Field Ops Briefing Tool—along with architectural notes and known issues.
